name: che-word-mcp
description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，233 個工具。v3.13.7 bump ooxml-swift v0.19.6→v0.19.7 — A-CONT mini-cycle of #58 closes 2 P0 from sub-stack A 6-AI verify（parseContainerChildBodyChildren parser asymmetry: body-level bookmarks in headers/footers/footnotes/endnotes still silently dropped post-v3.13.6; getBookmarks() walker missed body-level entries）。Same convergence-cycle pattern as R5-CONT-4 (#56): per-task gate caught one parser entry point; 6-AI verify caught the symmetric sibling. v3.13.6 sub-stack A 初始 fix（BodyChild enum 擴增 .bookmarkMarker + .rawBlockElement）。B re-numbered to v3.13.8 / #59 whitespace overlay; C unchanged v3.14.0 / #60 RunProperties audit。基於 ooxml-swift v0.19.7。
